summary: Iteration 60 - Admin Payout Dashboard. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly. The admin payout dashboard is fully functional with batch processing, CSV export, status management, and filtering capabilities.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com / MAYAsimpSON37!! works
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts returns all withdrawals with user_name, user_email
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts?status=pending returns only pending withdrawals
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts/summary returns counts and amounts for each status
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/{id} updates payout status to 'processing'
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/{id} updates payout status to 'completed' and sets paid_at
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/{id} returns 404 for non-existent ID
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts/export returns CSV file (Content-Type: text/csv)
Backend: All admin payout endpoints return 403 for non-admin users (5 endpoints tested)
Frontend: Navigate to /admin/payouts and verify 'Payout Dashboard' title
Frontend: Stats cards show Pending (0), Processing (2), Completed (3), Failed (1), Total User Balances ($0.48)
Frontend: Table shows user name, email, amount, method, paypal, status badge, requested date
Frontend: Action buttons (Complete, Fail) visible for processing payouts
Frontend: Select-all checkbox works for batch selection (shows '6 selected' and batch buttons)
Frontend: Export CSV button present and enabled
Frontend: Status filter dropdown changes displayed payouts (tested processing, completed, all)
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Payouts' link that navigates to /admin/payouts and shows active state
seed_data_creation: 6 test withdrawals exist in DB (0 pending, 2 processing, 3 completed, 1 failed) for user submitkalmori@gmail.com. Test non-admin user created during backend testing for 403 permission tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 tested the Admin Payout Dashboard feature. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/payouts (list all with user details), GET /api/admin/payouts?status={status} (filter by status), GET /api/admin/payouts/summary (stats overview), PUT /api/admin/payouts/{id} (update status), POST /api/admin/payouts/batch (batch update), GET /api/admin/payouts/export (CSV export). All endpoints require admin role (403 for non-admin). Frontend page at /admin/payouts shows stats cards, searchable/filterable table with batch selection, action buttons for status updates, and CSV export. The batch endpoint accepts {withdrawal_ids: [...], status: 'processing'|'completed'|'failed'}. CSV export includes headers: ID, User, Email, Amount, Method, PayPal Email, Status, Requested, Paid At, Transaction Ref, Notes.

endpoints.GET /api/admin/payouts: Returns all withdrawals with user_name, user_email
endpoints.GET /api/admin/payouts/summary: Returns pending_count, pending_amount, processing_count, processing_amount, completed_count, completed_amount, failed_count, total_user_balances
endpoints.PUT /api/admin/payouts/{id}: Updates status, sets paid_at for completed, handles wallet balance adjustments
endpoints.POST /api/admin/payouts/batch: Batch updates multiple payouts to processing/completed/failed
endpoints.GET /api/admin/payouts/export: Returns CSV file with all payout details

frontend_page.sidebar_link: Present with Wallet icon, navigates correctly, shows active state

admin_payout_dashboard.security: All endpoints return 403 for non-admin users
